series_metadata.series_description: These are slips of information that are disconnected from the original employment applications when individuals apply for a job with ODJFS. They contain information pertaining to age, sex, race, national origin, religion and disability and serve as statistical data that can be used in cases of discrimination in the work place.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office employment application is processed and completed ; Electronic: in office employment application is processed and completed
